LSE-MS7-L4-13001400-MSELA7-AGS-LAT-02 • MS ELA Grade 7 • Central Ideas in Informational Text

The Bilingual Buzzer

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What are the students mainly discussing?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about why the girl objects to translating the clues, explain the reasoning she gives, and state the conclusion about what translating would do.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RI.7.2  |  MS ELA Grade 7: Central Ideas in Informational Text
